## 🧭 Navigation Hints

## Agent Rules

- Do NOT duplicate configuration rules
- Always use source-of-truth files
- Use docs/ as knowledge base

## Documentation Language
- `docs/prompts/**` → Spanish allowed
- `docs/**` (excluding `prompts/`) → English only
